COURT TRIAL

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly scheduled for hearing on this day.Present: Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:J.Stokes, Reporter:P. Dowling. All parties present except defendant. The case is taken off-calendar and the request for jury trial is stricken. The case remains on the trial calendar.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2002 Continued To Jun-10-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant KEVIN CAMPBELL's motion to strike is O F F C A L E N D A R -- First Amended Complaint filed on May 10, 2002. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Defendant having failed to appear for settlement conference, the court order the jury trial stricken. Trial date confirmed. Clerk, D. Feinberg, Reporter, Joyce Long, Commissioner, Loretta Norris.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant KEVIN CAMPBELL in propria persona 351-0425 opposing party

Mr. Campbell represented in open court that he FAXED opposing counsel on or about 2:30 p.m. yesterday re intent to appear in court. Argument was presented and the Court granted the motion for summary adjudication as to continuing possession. The motion was denied as to the issue of damages. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
